# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

env:
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  PR_DESCRIPTION: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
  PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
  PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
  PR_HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
      
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
      
      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
      
      - name: Build application
        run: |
          echo "Building PR #${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}"
          npm run build
        env:
          BUILD_INFO: "PR #${{ env.PR_NUMBER }} - ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}"
      
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
      
      - name: Generate build metadata
        run: |
          cat > build-metadata.json <<EOF
          {
            "pr_number": "${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}",
            "pr_title": "${{ env.PR_TITLE }}",
            "pr_description": "${{ env.PR_DESCRIPTION }}",
            "pr_author": "${{ env.PR_AUTHOR }}",
            "pr_url": "${{ env.PR_URL }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ env.PR_HEAD_SHA }}",
            "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "workflow_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}"
          }
          EOF
          cat build-metadata.json
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-pr-${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build-metadata.json
          retention-days: 30
  
  notify-slack:
    name: Send Slack Notification
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Determine build status
        id: status
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "status=✅ Success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=good" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "status=❌ Failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=danger" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
      
      - name: Send Slack notification
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v1.24.0
        with:
          payload: |
            {
              "text": "PR Build Notification",
              "attachments": [
                {
                  "color": "${{ steps.status.outputs.color }}",
                  "title": "PR #${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}",
                  "title_link": "${{ env.PR_URL }}",
                  "fields": [
                    {
                      "title": "Status",
                      "value": "${{ steps.status.outputs.status }}",
                      "short": true
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Author",
                      "value": "${{ env.PR_AUTHOR }}",
                      "short": true
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Description",
                      "value": "${{ env.PR_DESCRIPTION }}",
                      "short": false
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Commit",
                      "value": "${{ env.PR_HEAD_SHA }}",
                      "short": true
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Workflow",
                      "value": "<https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}|View Run>",
                      "short": true
                    }
                  ],
                  "footer": "GitHub Actions",
                  "footer_icon": "https://github.githubassets.com/favicon.ico",
                  "ts": ${{ github.event.pull_request.updated_at }}
                }
              ]
            }
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_TYPE: INCOMING_WEBHOOK
  
  notify-teams:
    name: Send Teams Notification
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Determine build status
        id: status
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "status=Success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=00FF00" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "icon=✅" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "status=Failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "color=FF0000" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "icon=❌" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
      
      - name: Send Teams notification
        run: |
          curl -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
            -d '{
              "@type": "MessageCard",
              "@context": "https://schema.org/extensions",
              "summary": "PR Build: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}",
              "themeColor": "${{ steps.status.outputs.color }}",
              "title": "${{ steps.status.outputs.icon }} PR #${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}",
              "sections": [
                {
                  "activityTitle": "Build ${{ steps.status.outputs.status }}",
                  "activitySubtitle": "Author: ${{ env.PR_AUTHOR }}",
                  "facts": [
                    {
                      "name": "Description:",
                      "value": "${{ env.PR_DESCRIPTION }}"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "Commit:",
                      "value": "${{ env.PR_HEAD_SHA }}"
                    },
                    {
                      "name": "Status:",
                      "value": "${{ steps.status.outputs.status }}"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ],
              "potentialAction": [
                {
                  "@type": "OpenUri",
                  "name": "View Pull Request",
                  "targets": [
                    {
                      "os": "default",
                      "uri": "${{ env.PR_URL }}"
                    }
                  ]
                },
                {
                  "@type": "OpenUri",
                  "name": "View Workflow Run",
                  "targets": [
                    {
                      "os": "default",
                      "uri": "https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            }' \
            ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        if: env.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
  
  notify-email:
    name: Send Email Notification
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Send email notification
        uses: dawidd6/action-send-mail@v3
        with:
          server_address: smtp.gmail.com
          server_port: 465
          username: ${{ secrets.EMAIL_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.EMAIL_PASSWORD }}
          subject: "[${{ needs.build.result }}] PR #${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}"
          to: ${{ secrets.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL }}
          from: GitHub Actions
          html_body: |
            <h2>Pull Request Build Notification</h2>
            <h3>PR #${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}</h3>
            
            <p><strong>Status:</strong> ${{ needs.build.result }}</p>
            <p><strong>Author:</strong> ${{ env.PR_AUTHOR }}</p>
            <p><strong>Commit:</strong> ${{ env.PR_HEAD_SHA }}</p>
            
            <h4>Description:</h4>
            <p>${{ env.PR_DESCRIPTION }}</p>
            
            <h4>Links:</h4>
            <ul>
              <li><a href="${{ env.PR_URL }}">View Pull Request</a></li>
              <li><a href="https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}">View Workflow Run</a></li>
            </ul>
  
  update-pr-comment:
    name: Update PR Comment
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Create or update PR comment
        uses: actions/github-script@v6
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            const buildStatus = '${{ needs.build.result }}' === 'success' ? '✅ Success' : '❌ Failed';
            const statusIcon = '${{ needs.build.result }}' === 'success' ? '✅' : '❌';
            
            const comment = `
            ## ${statusIcon} Build Notification
            
            **PR Title:** ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}
            **Status:** ${buildStatus}
            **Commit:** \`${{ env.PR_HEAD_SHA }}\`
            **Build Time:** ${new Date().toUTCString()}
            
            ### Description
            ${{ env.PR_DESCRIPTION }}
            
            ---
            [View Workflow Run](https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})
            `;
            
            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: ${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}
            });
            
            const botComment = comments.find(comment => 
              comment.user.type === 'Bot' && 
              comment.body.includes('Build Notification')
            );
            
            if (botComment) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                comment_id: botComment.id,
                body: comment
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: ${{ env.PR_NUMBER }},
                body: comment
              });
            }
  
  generate-release-notes:
    name: Generate Release Notes Entry
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: needs.build.result == 'success'
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Create release notes entry
        run: |
          mkdir -p .release-notes
          cat > .release-notes/pr-${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}.md <<EOF
          # PR #${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}: ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}
          
          **Author:** ${{ env.PR_AUTHOR }}
          **Date:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)
          **Commit:** ${{ env.PR_HEAD_SHA }}
          **PR URL:** ${{ env.PR_URL }}
          
          ## Description
          ${{ env.PR_DESCRIPTION }}
          
          ## Build Information
          - Build Status: Success
          - Workflow Run: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
          - Build Date: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
          EOF
          
          cat .release-notes/pr-${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}.md
      
      - name: Upload release notes entry
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: release-notes-pr-${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}
          path: .release-notes/pr-${{ env.PR_NUMBER }}.md
          retention-days: 90
